name: The Dawn of Computation
description: Initial development of automatic computation systems, from mechanical to vacuum tubes.

name: The Era of High-Level Languages
description: The move from machine-specific assembly to the first compilers and reusable code structures.

name: The Structured Revolution
description: The rise of blocks, flow control, and formal program structures, leading to modularity.

name: The Object-Oriented Explosion
description: The dominance of encapsulation, classes, and metaphors that model the real world.

name: The Web 1.0 & Scripting Surge
description: Rapid development of dynamic languages for the browser, server, and system glue.

name: The Cloud & Concurrency Shift
description: Focus on horizontal scaling, distributed systems, and the resurgence of functional patterns for concurrency.

name: The Safety & DX Renaissance
description: A move towards zero-cost memory safety, expressive type systems, and polished developer tooling.

name: The AI & Autonomic Era
description: The emergence of AI-native languages, specialized accelerators, and autonomous system optimizations.
